subject: Can we customize what shows in the Cloudsign activity column?
body: Our team finds the Cloudsign activity column more confusing than helpful. The 'View activity' link buries the actual signal behind a click and the 'Offline' label means different things in different contexts. Would it be possible to either: (a) customize what appears there per team, (b) replace it with a more useful at-a-glance signal like 'Last opened: X days ago' or 'Signed: yes/no,' or (c) hide it entirely if we don't find it useful? Right now my team mostly ignores it and that feels like a missed opportunity for a feature you've clearly invested in.
